title: bulbophyllum xanthoacron
intro: Bulbophyllum xanthoacron is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is often referred to as the "yellow-throated bulbophyllum" due to its distinctive yellow markings on the throat of its flowers. The medicinal properties of Bulbophyllum xanthoacron include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil for medicinal use.
